meaning: n.一种短腿长身的德国种猎犬
examples: He wanted to draw a picture of it, but he wasn't sure how to spell "dachshund", so he simply wrote "Hot Dog".
"Dachshund" is a German small long thin dog.
Tad Dorgan, saw the red hot dachshund sausages sold on streets.
He started using the FURminator on his dog, Turkey, a suspected long-haired Chihuahua-dachshund mix.
Jasper, a 10-year-old dachshund, is one of the dogs which took part in the trial.
